title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.304 - Rick Harmon Memorial Highway designated in Taney County
text:
227.304.  Rick Harmon Memorial Highway designated in Taney County. — The portion of U.S. Highway 160 in Taney County from State Route 76, known as the Kissee Mills Junction, to State Route 125, known as the Rueter Junction, shall be designated the "Rick Harmon Memorial Highway".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donations.
(L. 2005 H.B. 43)
